This report fingerprints GitClaw's OpenClaw/Hermes-style skill surface as a body-free lockfile: local skills, prompt-visible selected skills, skill bundles, and reviewed source pins are represented by paths, counts, short hashes, and gates only. Raw skill bodies, raw descriptions, bundle instructions, source refs, issue bodies, comments, prompts, provider payloads, credentials, and secret values are not included.
